cards.Chinese: 他不但爱读书，而且喜欢唱歌。
cards.English: He not only loves reading but also likes singing.
cards.Raw Text:
他不但爱读书，而且喜欢唱歌。
He not only loves reading but also likes singing.

1. moreover, as well as, but also

‎

不但 búdàn - not only

‎

    


Characters: 而


且

cards.Chinese: 不但要认真地工作，而且还得需要有耐心。
cards.English: You not only have to work seriously but also need to be patient.
cards.Raw Text:
不但要认真地工作，而且还得需要有耐心。
You not only have to work seriously but also need to be patient.

1. moreover, as well as, but also

‎

不但 búdàn - not only  耐心 nàixīn - patient

‎

    


Characters: 而


且

cards.Chinese: 没想到，花不仅没有长出来，而且都死了。
cards.English: Unexpectedly, the flowers not only didn’t grow but also all died.
cards.Raw Text:
没想到，花不仅没有长出来，而且都死了。
Unexpectedly, the flowers not only didn’t grow but also all died.

1. moreover, as well as, but also

‎

不仅 bùjǐn - not only

‎

    


Characters: 而


且

cards.Chinese: 请给我一瓶啤酒，并且帮我打开。
cards.English: Please give me a bottle of beer and help me open it.
cards.Raw Text:
请给我一瓶啤酒，并且帮我打开。
Please give me a bottle of beer and help me open it.

1. and also, furthermore

‎

一瓶啤酒 yìpíngpíjiǔ - one bottle of beer (瓶 is the measure word for bottles)

‎

    


Characters: 并


且

cards.Chinese: 她不但长得难看，而且声音很难听，并且还很臭。
cards.English: She not only looks ugly, but her voice is also unpleasant, and she even smells bad.
cards.Raw Text:
她不但长得难看，而且声音很难听，并且还很臭。
She not only looks ugly, but her voice is also unpleasant, and she even smells bad.

1. and also, furthermore

‎

    


Characters: 并


且

cards.Chinese: 我的姐姐比我大三岁。
cards.English: My sister is three years older than me.
cards.Raw Text:
我的姐姐比我大三岁。
My sister is three years older than me.

1. older sister

‎

‎

    


Characters: 姐

cards.Chinese: 这位小姐长相很好。
cards.English: This young lady is good-looking.
cards.Raw Text:
这位小姐长相很好。
This young lady is good-looking.

1. young lady

‎

位 wèi - measure word for people showing respect

Characters: 小


姐

cards.Chinese: 这里的饮料很便宜。
cards.English: The drinks here are very cheap.
cards.Raw Text:
这里的饮料很便宜。
The drinks here are very cheap.

1. cheap (piányi)

‎

饮料 yǐnliào - beverage; drink

Characters: 宜


便

cards.Chinese: 儿子的病好了，妈妈终于放心了。
cards.English: The son’s illness got better, and the mother finally felt relieved.
cards.Raw Text:
儿子的病好了，妈妈终于放心了。
The son’s illness got better, and the mother finally felt relieved.

1. sick, illness

‎

终于 zhōngyú - finally

‎

    


Characters: 病

cards.Chinese: 他不但病了，而且病得很重，医生都说没办法了。
cards.English: He not only was sick but was seriously ill; the doctors all said there was nothing they could do.
cards.Raw Text:
他不但病了，而且病得很重，医生都说没办法了。
He not only was sick but was seriously ill; the doctors all said there was nothing they could do.

1. sick, illness

‎

‎

    


Characters: 病

cards.Chinese: 在一个冬天，他的爸爸病得起不了床。
cards.English: One winter, his father was so sick he couldn’t get out of bed.
cards.Raw Text:
在一个冬天，他的爸爸病得起不了床。
One winter, his father was so sick he couldn’t get out of bed.

1. sick, illness

‎

‎

    


Characters: 病

cards.Chinese: 我病了，现在是个病人。
cards.English: I am sick; now I am a patient.
cards.Raw Text:
我病了，现在是个病人。
I am sick; now I am a patient.

1. patient

‎

‎

    


Characters: 病


人

cards.Chinese: 我今天生病了，发烧了，没办法去上班。
cards.English: I am sick today and I have a fever, so I can’t go to work.
cards.Raw Text:
我今天生病了，发烧了，没办法去上班。
I am sick today and I have a fever, so I can’t go to work.

1. to get sick

‎

发烧 fāshāo - have a fever

‎

    


Characters: 病


生

cards.Chinese: 生病了就应该去医院看病，看了病，医生才知道让你吃什么药。
cards.English: When you are sick, you should go to the hospital; after examining you, the doctor will know what medicine to give you.
cards.Raw Text:
生病了就应该去医院看病，看了病，医生才知道让你吃什么药。
When you are sick, you should go to the hospital; after examining you, the doctor will know what medicine to give you.

to visit a doctor, to see a patient

‎

‎

    


Characters: 病


看

cards.Chinese: 我感冒了，头很疼。
cards.English: I have a cold, and my head hurts a lot.
cards.Raw Text:
我感冒了，头很疼。
I have a cold, and my head hurts a lot.

1. painful

‎

感冒 gǎnmào - catch cold; (common) cold

‎

    


Characters: 疼

cards.Chinese: 小孩喜欢在纸上画画。
cards.English: Children like to draw on paper.
cards.Raw Text:
小孩喜欢在纸上画画。
Children like to draw on paper.

1. paper

‎

画画 huàhuà - to draw pictures

工资 gōngzī - wages

Characters: 低

cards.Chinese: 三儿子红着脸，低下了头，他说：“对不起，爸爸。”
cards.English: The third son, blushing, lowered his head and said: “Sorry, Dad.”
cards.Raw Text:
三儿子红着脸，低下了头，他说：“对不起，爸爸。”
The third son, blushing, lowered his head and said: “Sorry, Dad.”

‎

脸 liǎn - face

Characters: 低

cards.English: There is a park to the north of the house I live in.
cards.Raw Text:
我住的房子北边有一个公园。
There is a park to the north of the house I live in.

1. north, the north

‎

‎

    


Characters: 边


北

cards.English: From there, walking two kilometers south, there is a school.
cards.Raw Text:
那里往南边走两公里有一个学校。
From there, walking two kilometers south, there is a school.

1. south, the south

‎

‎

    


Characters: 南


边

cards.English: The child is already asleep.
cards.Raw Text:
孩子已经睡了。
The child is already asleep.

1. to sleep

‎

‎

    


Characters: 睡

cards.Chinese: 过了一会儿，大灰狼睡着了。
cards.English: After a while, the big gray wolf fell asleep.
cards.Raw Text:
过了一会儿，大灰狼睡着了。
After a while, the big gray wolf fell asleep.

1. to sleep

‎

大灰狼 dàhuīláng - big grey wolf

‎

    


Characters: 睡

cards.Chinese: 可是大灰狼才吃了奶奶，它还不饿，所以它想睡一会儿，醒了再吃小红帽。
cards.English: But the big gray wolf had just eaten Grandma; it wasn’t hungry yet, so it wanted to sleep for a while and eat Little Red Riding Hood when it woke up.
cards.Raw Text:
可是大灰狼才吃了奶奶，它还不饿，所以它想睡一会儿，醒了再吃小红帽。
But the big gray wolf had just eaten Grandma; it wasn’t hungry yet, so it wanted to sleep for a while and eat Little Red Riding Hood when it woke up.

1. to sleep

‎

大灰狼 dàhuīláng - big grey wolf    小红帽 xiǎohóngmào - little red riding hood    醒 xǐng - wake up

‎

    


Characters: 睡

cards.Chinese: 睡觉前不可以做剧烈的运动。
cards.English: You shouldn’t do strenuous exercise before sleeping.
cards.Raw Text:
睡觉前不可以做剧烈的运动。
You shouldn’t do strenuous exercise before sleeping.

1. to sleep

‎

睡觉 shuìjiào - to sleep (this is a verb-what construction, where the first “sleep” 睡 is a verb, and the second “sleep” 觉 is a noun, kind of like the English word “slumber”. This is important to know...

剧烈 jùliè - fierce

‎

    


Characters: 睡


觉

cards.Chinese: 他把种子放进土里，然后浇了点水，就准备回去睡觉了。
cards.English: He put the seeds into the soil, watered them a little, and then got ready to go back to sleep.
cards.Raw Text:
他把种子放进土里，然后浇了点水，就准备回去睡觉了。
He put the seeds into the soil, watered them a little, and then got ready to go back to sleep.

1. to sleep

‎

浇 jiāo - water  种子 zhǒngzi - seed

‎

    


Characters: 睡


觉

cards.Chinese: 它把小红帽关在了一个大盒子里，自己又回到床上睡觉了。
cards.English: It locked Little Red Riding Hood in a big box and went back to bed to sleep.
cards.Raw Text:
它把小红帽关在了一个大盒子里，自己又回到床上睡觉了。
It locked Little Red Riding Hood in a big box and went back to bed to sleep.

1. to sleep

‎

小红帽 xiǎohóngmào - little red riding hood

盒子 hézi - box

‎

    


Characters: 睡


觉

cards.English: He was so tired he couldn’t speak and went back to his room to sleep.

他就累得说不出话，回房睡觉去了。
